title: What was the saddest part of Eva for you
display_title: What was the saddest part of Eva for you
wikitext:
[]: What was the saddest part of Eva for you?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Apr 20, 2010 2:07 pm What was the saddest scene/theme/song/realization for you regarding the series proper? Did a character's backstory seem slightly worse than the others to you? Did a scene tug at your heart? Did one particular moment feel more depressing to you? For me, ironically enough, it's a tossup between Shinji and Asuka, considering both of their backstories tie into my greatest fear. (Which shall remain unsaid.) What about the rest of you?

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Apr 20, 2010 2:10 pm Episode 15 Kiss Scene. Naivete + Hurt Feelings = Ran sad.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Apr 20, 2010 2:12 pm It was when Shinji rejected Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Apr 20, 2010 2:16 pm Rei II's death.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 2:23 pm Episode 1, the scene where Gendo basicallly told Shinji to pilot the Eva or GTFO. Poor kid, it's things like that which cause a 14 year-old to get so sick in the head that they fap over a comatose red-head.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:16 pm Allemann wrote: It was when Shinji rejected Instrumentality.

[]:             Quote Post by Peewit » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:18 pm I can't really think of anything in particular that made me feel sad, but the piece of music called Thanatos probably moved me the most of anything. It was used during the Zeruel fight, where Nerv were throwing everything they could at it (and failing) and Shinji was trying to get back to HQ after deciding he wanted to pilot Eva again. The entire scene was extremely memorable, but the music really made it.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:47 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Rei II's death.

[]:             Quote Post by Mariruri » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:56 pm In EoE when Asuka is mutilated (her death). It really got to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:57 pm @SSAS What the hell?? In EoE when Asuka is mutilated (her death). It really got to me.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Tue Apr 20, 2010 3:57 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: @SSAS What the hell??

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 4:04 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: @SSAS What the hell??

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue Apr 20, 2010 4:21 pm ...you really wanna know? Episode 15, 18, 22'-24', EoE. They were all sad, indeed. Enough said.

[]:             Quote Post by Mariruri » Tue Apr 20, 2010 4:53 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: Hey, im just saying. As for the Asuka mutilation scene, that was pretty bad too. Not sad, but it made me think, "Ouch, thats really got to hurt."

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:00 pm Mariruri wrote: I thought it was terrible death for her. Although she did die technically in battle.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:03 pm She conclusively died in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:06 pm Allemann wrote: She conclusively died in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:07 pm I meant Rei. My mistake.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:12 pm Allemann wrote: I meant Rei. My mistake.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:16 pm ...
